title: Artifact Collection
description: Array of Artifact records. Each element: A single research artifact associated with a conference paper.

Artifact.description: A single research artifact associated with a conference paper.

conference.description: Conference abbreviation, e.g. 'OSDI', 'USENIXSEC', 'NDSS'. See CONFERENCE_NAMES for the full list.
conference.title: Conference

category.description: Research domain: 'systems' or 'security', determined by the conference.
category.title: Category

title.description: Full paper title as it appears in the conference proceedings.
title.title: Title

badges.description: Artifact evaluation badges awarded by the AE committee. Canonical lowercase values: 'available', 'functional', 'reproduced', 'reusable', 'replicated'. Some older data retains capitalized variants, e.g. 'Available', 'Functional'.
badges.title: Badges

artifact_urls.description: All artifact-related URLs for this paper. Includes GitHub/GitLab repos, Zenodo DOIs, and other archives. Example: ['https://github.com/org/repo', 'https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.12345'].
artifact_urls.title: Artifact Urls

doi.description: Canonical artifact DOI extracted from artifact_urls, e.g. '10.5281/zenodo.12345'. Empty string if none found.
doi.title: Doi

paper_url.description: DOI URL or direct link to the published paper, e.g. 'https://doi.org/10.1145/...'. Null if unavailable.
paper_url.title: Paper Url

appendix_url.description: URL to supplementary materials or appendix. Null if unavailable.
appendix_url.title: Appendix Url

award.description: Award designation such as 'Distinguished Artifact'. Null if no award.
award.title: Award

Artifact.title: Artifact
